Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce a list of targeted open ended questions to clarify and improve understanding of the property onboarding process described

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The questions should aim to uncover missing details understand decision criteria clarify roles and responsibilities verify timing and sequencing and learn about how exceptions are handled

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Lets break down the process and see what we know

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Initial contact landlord contacts regional office property coordinator reviews documentation If missing outdated request updates Then coordinator records property details into central property database

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Assign dedicated property manager based on workload geographic specialization experience with property types track record with unique requirements Then introductory call meeting to align expectations and discuss special conditions

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Schedule photographer and inspector If issues manager works with landlord to address Once passes digital marketing team creates listings brochures updates pricing models

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Activated in rental portal and internal systems Tenant screening applications credit checks employment verification references If multiple tenants manager may negotiate lease terms offer promotional discounts or prioritize longer leases Once suitable tenant is chosen finalize lease collect deposit schedule move in

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Quality checks and internal audits compliance officer reviews lease financial analyst verifies rental price IT checks listing integration exceptions special insurance custom lease clauses communication tracked via email CRM project management tools

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We need to ask questions to uncover missing details understand decision criteria clarify roles verify timing learn about exceptions

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Decision criteria for assigning property manager what specific thresholds How is workload measured How are geographic boundaries defined How is track record measured What if no manager meets all criteria

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Timing how long does each step take Are there service level agreements or expected durations What if there are delays Are there deadlines for landlords to provide missing documents

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Roles and responsibilities who is responsible for verifying documentation who approves that documentation is complete who decides if a property passes inspection who schedules contractors who activates the property in the rental portal who does tenant screening

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Exceptions mentioned properties requiring special insurance landlords insisting on custom lease clauses How are these handled Who approves What about properties that fail inspection multiple times or landlord refuses to make repairs

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Decision points We need to understand the approval flows after documentation verification after manager assignment after inspection pass after tenant selection after quality checks

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Communication and tracking How are emails CRM project management tools used What is the handoff between teams How is progress monitored

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: There is likely a representation agreement that outlines responsibilities fees etc Not mentioned

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So we need to ask Is there a step where the landlord and company sign a property management agreement When does that happen Who prepares it

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: There might be a step of property valuation or assessment to determine the rental price range The coordinator records expected rental price range but how is that expected range determined

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We should aim for around 10 to 15 questions covering the key areas

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Potential questions

Name: Validation - PE
Text: These questions are open ended seeking to uncover missing details decision criteria roles timing exceptions etc

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We should not include any explanation just the questions Also we should ensure they are not about SQL or implementation details

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: We might want to ask about the beginning Is there a formal agreement between the company and landlord before proceeding That is important So add a question about the management contract

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: We should also ask about the decision to accept a property after reviewing documentation does the company ever decline to onboard a property Under what circumstances

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: We might cover that in the marketing question However the initial recording is done by coordinator not marketing So we need to ask about that step

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The prompt says Please produce a list of targeted open ended questions you would ask the interviewee to enhance your clarity on this complex property onboarding process So we need to output a list of questions

Name: Validation - PE
Text: These cover the areas initial documentation agreement assignment intro meeting photographer inspector issue resolution marketing price tenant screening lease finalization quality checks exceptions communication tracking roles timing and rejection criteria
